positive: A stylized minimalist illustration of a mountain range silhouette at sunset, featuring geometric abstract mountain peaks and rolling hills. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, and warm cream. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, creating a striking pattern suitable for apparel printing. Include abstract geometric elements like crescent moons and stylized clouds intersecting the peaks. Clean lines, bold contrast, and crisp details are essential. Vector illustration style, high contrast, flat graphic design, centered subject, clean silhouette, suitable for fabric textile print.
